summary: Executed Phases 1-3 of the plan: created .github/workflows/ci.yml (nix-flake-check workflow: push+pull_request triggers, cancel-in-progress concurrency group, actions/checkout@v7 + cachix/install-nix-action@v31 with github_access_token + `nix flake check`), verified locally that `nix flake check` passes (33.159s, all checks passed) and the workflow YAML parses without error, staged the workflow file with a specific-path `git add`, and documented an optional opt-in local pre-push hook under README.md's `## Maintenance` section (also staged with a specific-path `git add`). Phase 4 (create branch if needed, commit, push, confirm first CI run green) was NOT executed by this agent per explicit orchestrator-mode instruction that the orchestrator performs the final commit; the two changes remain staged, uncommitted.

blockers: Phase 4 (commit, push, confirm first CI run green) requires a git commit and push, which this agent was instructed NOT to perform in orchestrator mode. The orchestrator must commit the two staged files, branch off master first if needed, push, and confirm the Actions run via `gh run list --workflow=ci.yml` (or `gh run watch`).
